caveat: This framework content pack is a structured starter representation and does not constitute legal advice or complete regulatory coverage. This is a starter content pack for scoping purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice or a complete compliance determination.

obligations.title: Define governance accountability for trust services criteria
obligations.description: Establish board and management accountability for security, availability, confidentiality, processing integrity, and privacy objectives.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies where services are in-scope for SOC 2 attestation.

obligations.title: Communicate internal control responsibilities
obligations.description: Define and communicate control responsibilities to personnel and service providers across in-scope systems.

obligations.title: Perform periodic risk assessments
obligations.description: Identify and evaluate risks to the security, availability, confidentiality, processing integrity, and privacy commitments.
obligations.applicability_notes: Frequency should reflect system and threat changes.

obligations.title: Monitor control performance and exceptions
obligations.description: Implement ongoing and periodic monitoring to detect control failures, investigate exceptions, and track remediation.
obligations.applicability_notes: Supports audit evidence for operating effectiveness.

obligations.title: Document and maintain key control procedures
obligations.description: Maintain documented procedures for key technical and administrative controls supporting trust service commitments.
obligations.applicability_notes: Includes procedures for evidence retention and review.

obligations.title: Enforce logical access controls
obligations.description: Provision, modify, and revoke logical access using least privilege, strong authentication, and periodic access reviews.
obligations.applicability_notes: Covers workforce, contractor, and privileged account access.

obligations.title: Operate incident response and availability processes
obligations.description: Detect, respond to, and recover from security and availability incidents with defined escalation paths.

obligations.title: Control system changes
obligations.description: Use change management controls for code, infrastructure, and configuration changes, including approvals and testing.

obligations.title: Manage third-party and privacy risk
obligations.description: Evaluate and monitor vendor risk, data confidentiality protections, and privacy commitments across subprocessors.
obligations.applicability_notes: Includes due diligence and periodic reassessments.

obligations.title: Implement privacy notice and consent handling
obligations.description: Maintain privacy disclosures and consent/choice handling consistent with collected personal information and processing purposes.
obligations.applicability_notes: Relevant when SOC 2 privacy criteria are in scope.

content_versions.obligation_text: Define and maintain governance accountability for SOC 2 trust service commitments.
Communicate control expectations and reporting responsibilities to relevant personnel.
Perform periodic risk assessments tied to trust service commitments and threat changes.
Monitor controls and remediate deficiencies with documented follow-up.
Maintain documentation and evidence for key control procedures.
Implement logical access management, least privilege, and periodic entitlement review.
Maintain incident response and continuity activities supporting security and availability.
Apply approved change management controls to production systems.
Address vendor and privacy risks through due diligence and monitoring.
Provide privacy notices and manage consent/choice according to processing activities.
